text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day after school. In the library, I spotted Chrono Genesis and another horsegirl watching her from a distance.

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Ugh… Just as I thought, Chrono is currently…
choice_data_list: <size=40>Do you have some business with Chrono?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Oh, you are Chrono's… Yes, I'm here to give her back the test notes I borrowed. They were so beautifully organized, so I just wanted to say thanks…

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
But Chrono right now, she seems so incredibly focused… 
Like she's exuding an aura that's completely different from her usual, gentle self…

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text: I feel like I'd be disturbing her, so it's hard to speak up… but I have something else to do after this… what should I do?
choice_data_list: I'll hold onto it for you and give it to her
I'll hold onto it for you and give it to her

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: This time it's 1700m on dirt, clockwise… #10 drawing a lot of attention… It's true, you can't take your eyes off that front-running power from their wire-to-wire win in the last race…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: But the one I'm keeping an eye on is #6… Even though they haven't been performing well in their last few races, this time they've got a shorter distance, and the track conditions—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Hya…! T-Trainer… 
H-H-How long have you been there…?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I see… So you've brought this in her place…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I ended up doing something wrong to her… 
I was working on my predictions and just got completely lost in them…
choice_data_list: <size=40>By the way, Which race were you predicting?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Um… it's for today's race meet. I've finished most of my predictions, so now I want to see the participants' condition in person to improve my accuracy…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… the pre-race warm-ups. I'd better get going now…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…#6's condition… just as predicted… 
#10's hindquarter movement… yeah. With this…
choice_data_list: Have you made your final prediction?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Yes. The favorite is #6. The main rival is #10. First place is a lock for #6, and I believe the battle for second will likely be between #10 and #12…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before long, the warm-ups ended, and the athletes began entering their gates one after another. However—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Drip… Drip…)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clouds rapidly covered the sky, and rain began to pour just as the race started. Spectators scurried this way and that, seeking shelter under the roof.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: —#6 is running second in the lead group… They have a history of placing in heavy track conditions, so they're running calmly… If I think about past races…
choice_data_list: <size=38>Chrono, you should get under the roof too…!</size>
<size=38>Chrono, you should get under the roof too…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
No…! This is the spot…! 
I have to be in the front row…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Even in past history, there have been all sorts of fierce battles fought in the rain…! When I think that this race, too, might one day lead to that kind of legendary clash—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I don't want to take my eyes off it for a single second…!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: History is a "painting." It's a massive, single painting that emerges when the countless "dots" drawn by everyone involved in racing connect to form lines.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Before, she said she was captivated by history. This passion of hers, undeterred by the rain, was exactly what it meant to be captivated——

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Eh, #3 is making a move here…!? 
Taking advantage of #6's opening… Whoa! Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
#3's… final surge…! 
…Amazing…! Amazing, amazing!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: #6 was supposed to have the aptitude for a heavy track too…! And yet, they overturned all of my expectations… Ha. This development, if I recall…!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I followed Chrono Genesis into the trainer's office, only to find her staring intently at the reference footage of the race.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I knew it…! Even in that past race, my expectations were overturned…! Ah, right there—replay that part…!
choice_data_list: Here, a towel. Let's dry you off first

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Eh? Ah, Trainer…… 
A towel……?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: —Aaaaah!? I-I'm so sorry!! I'm all soaking wet… and… ah-choo!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I am truly sorry… If there are still any wet spots anywhere, I'll clean them up right away…
choice_data_list: <size=40>It's fine. You were just really focused, right?</size>
<size=40>It's fine. You were just really focused, right?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes…! Even now, my heart's still racing… I think I'll write a column about this for the next school newspaper…
choice_data_list: <size=39>I'm looking forward to it! Just don't overdo it</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…………! 
Ah, t-thank you very much……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…………I see… I've made you worry about me again… 
Making you deliver my notes, and even dragging you out to watch a race in the rain…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Could it be… that there's actually been so much more…?)
